posts.author: becca_colesoft (Becca C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Allow columns to be pinned (at least the first “Name” column) in dashboard widgets

What are you trying to achieve

Given that there are often multiple widgets on a dashboard, dashboard views are frequently even more narrow than regular board views. Being able to tell what item you are viewing is essential (and basic!) functionality. Please consider allowing column pinning on dashboard Table and List widgets, or pinning the Name column by default!
